name: Daily IMAP Email Summary to Telegram (Local Ollama)

nodes.name: Fetch Gmail via IMAP
nodes.notes: Configure USER, PASSWORD, and HOST in this node. For Gmail, use an app password and HOST=imap.gmail.com.

nodes.name: Send ntfy Summary
nodes.notes: Optional fallback. Replace YOUR_NTFY_TOPIC or remove this node if you do not want ntfy fallback.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Summary
nodes.notes: Set YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID and select/create your Telegram credential after import.

parameters.jsCode:
const source = $json || {};
const fallback = source.fallback_structured || { summary: 'No actionable email threads in the last 24 hours.', urgent_items: [], for_info: [] };
const systemPrompt = [
  'You are an executive email triage assistant.',
  'Return exactly one valid JSON object and nothing else.',
  'Do not include markdown, code fences, commentary, or chain-of-thought.',
  'Classify only real user-specific actions as urgent.',
  'Promotions, job alerts, newsletters, market alerts, generic offers, social updates, and informational notices are not urgent unless the thread clearly requires a pending action from the user.',
  'Use this exact schema:',
  '{',
  '  "summary": "string",',
  '  "urgent_items": [{"subject":"string","sender":"string","reason":"string"}],',
  '  "for_info": [{"subject":"string","sender":"string","note":"string"}]',
  '}',
  'Rules:',
  '- summary must be one sentence under 140 characters',
  '- urgent_items must contain at most 5 items',
  '- for_info must contain at most 3 items',
  '- reason and note must each be under 90 characters',
  '- if there is no urgent item, return urgent_items as []',
  '- preserve the real subject and sender text from the input',
  '',
  'Few-shot example input:',
  'Thread Key: subj:google security alert',
  'Normalized Subject: Google security alert',
  'Latest Subject: Google security alert',
  'Latest Sender: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>',
  'Message Count: 1',
  'Last Email UTC: 2026-04-01T16:00:00+00:00',
  'Conversation:',
  'Message 1',
  'Date: 2026-04-01T16:00:00+00:00',
  'From: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>',
  'Subject: Google security alert',
  'Body: New sign-in detected from a new device. Review activity and secure the account if this was not you.',
  '',
  'Few-shot example output:',
  '{',
  '  "summary": "One security email requires immediate review.",',
  '  "urgent_items": [',
  '    {',
  '      "subject": "Google security alert",',
  '      "sender": "Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>",',
  '      "reason": "New sign-in alert requires account verification."',
  '    }',
  '  ],',
  '  "for_info": []',
  '}',
].join('\n');

const userPrompt = [
  'Analyze the following last-24-hour email threads.',
  `Total emails: ${source.email_count_24h ?? 0}`,
  `Total threads: ${source.total_thread_count ?? 0}`,
  `Candidate threads: ${source.candidate_thread_count ?? 0}`,
  `Muted threads before model: ${source.blocked_thread_count ?? 0}`,
  source.blocked_examples_text ? `Muted examples: ${source.blocked_examples_text}` : 'Muted examples: None',
  '',
  'Return only the JSON object.',
  '',
  source.candidate_thread_context || '(no candidate threads)',
].join('\n');

return {
  json: {
    ...source,
    system_prompt: systemPrompt,
    user_prompt: userPrompt,
    prompt_text: `${systemPrompt}\n\n${userPrompt}`,
  },
};

nodes.name: Call Ollama Summary API

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'YOUR_OLLAMA_MODEL', stream: false, think: false, format: 'json', keep_alive: '15m', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }], options: { temperature: 0, num_ctx: 32768, num_predict: 260 } }) }}

nodes.notes: Set YOUR_OLLAMA_MODEL to a locally available Ollama model and make sure Ollama is reachable at the configured URL.
